# See https://github.com/check-spelling/check-spelling/wiki/Configuration-Examples:-excludes

(?:^|/)(?i)LICEN[CS]E
(?:^|/)(?i)third[-_]?party/
(?:^|/)3rdparty/
(?:^|/)generated/
(?:^|/)go\.sum$
(?:^|/)package(?:-lock|)\.json$
(?:^|/)Pipfile$
(?:^|/)pyproject.toml
(?:^|/)vendor/
(?:^|/|\b)requirements(?:-dev|-doc|-test|)\.txt$
-lock\.yaml$
/blobs/[^/]+$
/texture/bootstrap/[^/]+$
\.a$
\.ai$
\.all-contributorsrc$
\.avi$
\.bmp$
\.bz2$
\.cert?$|\.crt$
\.class$
\.coveragerc$
\.crl$
\.csr$
\.dll$
\.docx?$
\.drawio$
\.DS_Store$
\.eot$
\.eps$
\.exe$
\.gif$
\.git-blame-ignore-revs$
\.gitattributes$
\.gitkeep$
\.graffle$
\.gz$
\.icns$
\.ico$
\.ipynb$
\.jar$
\.jks$
\.jpe?g$
\.key$
\.lib$
\.lock$
\.map$
\.min\..
\.mo$
\.mod$
\.mp[34]$
\.o$
\.ocf$
\.otf$
\.p12$
\.parquet$
\.pdf$
\.pem$
\.pfx$
\.png$
\.psd$
\.pyc$

\.qm$
\.s$

^\.github/actions/spelling/
^\Q.github/workflows/spelling.yml\E$
^\Qtests/texture/zran/233c72f2b6b698c07021c4da367cfe2dff4f049efbaa885ca0ff760ea297865a.blob.meta\E$
^ADOPTERS\.md$
^contrib/nydusify/examples/manifest/cache_manifest\.json$
^misc/top_images/image_list\.txt$
^tests/texture/repeatable/blake3-lz4_block-non_repeatable$

^tests/texture/toc/2fa78cad554b75ac91a4a125ed148d0ddeb25efa4aaa8bd80e5dc292690a4dca$
